best_qa_per_chain.question: Elizabeth of York marriages children
best_qa_per_chain.answer: Elizabeth of York married Henry VII on January 18, 1486, and they had seven children together. Their offspring included Arthur, Margaret, Henry VIII, and Mary. This marriage was significant in uniting the rival houses of York and Lancaster.

best_qa_per_chain.question: Elizabeth of York Henry VII marriage details
best_qa_per_chain.answer: Elizabeth of York married Henry VII on January 18, 1486. This marriage was significant as it united the rival houses of York and Lancaster, effectively ending the Wars of the Roses. At the time of their marriage, Henry was 29 years old and Elizabeth was 20.

citations.title: Elizabeth of York - Wikipedia
The Marriage of Henry VII and Elizabeth of York
18 January 1486 – The marriage of Henry VII and Elizabeth of York

best_qa_per_chain.question: Elizabeth of York historical marriage records
best_qa_per_chain.answer: Elizabeth of York was married to Henry VII of England in 1486. This marriage was significant as it united the rival houses of York and Lancaster, symbolizing peace after years of conflict. Elizabeth was the eldest daughter of King Edward IV, and her marriage helped legitimize Henry VII's claim to the throne.

best_qa_per_chain.question: Nuneaton political party stronghold changes
best_qa_per_chain.answer: Nuneaton's political landscape has seen significant changes recently. Labour gained control of the Nuneaton and Bedworth Borough Council from the Conservatives in May 2024, winning 15 seats while the Conservatives lost 11. However, by December 2024, Labour lost control again, and in May 2025, Reform UK achieved a major victory, taking almost all seats in the borough's council elections.

best_qa_per_chain.question: Nuneaton Tory Labour election results 2024
best_qa_per_chain.answer: In the 2024 elections, Labour, led by Jodie Gosling, won the Nuneaton parliamentary seat, overturning a Conservative majority with a swing of 14.5%. Labour also gained overall control of the Nuneaton and Bedworth Borough Council from the Conservatives. The council election took place on May 2, 2024, while the general election was held on July 4, 2024.

citations.title: 2024 Nuneaton and Bedworth Borough Council election

Labour wins in key bellwether seats

best_qa_per_chain.question: accessible bathroom design features angled mirror
best_qa_per_chain.answer: Angled mirrors are an important feature in accessible bathroom design, as they allow seated individuals, such as those in wheelchairs, to see themselves clearly. These mirrors are typically hung at a downward angle to enhance visibility for users who may not be able to stand. This design consideration is commonly recommended in accessible bathroom guidelines.

citations.title: How To Design an Accessible Bathroom
7 Ways to Create an Accessible Bathroom Design
5 Tips for Designing Your Accessible Bathroom

best_qa_per_chain.question: angled mirror installation requirements for accessibility
emergency pull cord height regulations
best_qa_per_chain.answer: Emergency pull cords should hang between 2 to 6 inches (5.08—15.24 cm) from the floor to be accessible for individuals lying on the floor. Additionally, for accessibility compliance, the top of the pull cord should not exceed 48 inches in height for individuals in wheelchairs, as per ADA requirements.

citations.title: Emergency Stop Pull-Cords - Machinery Safety 101
Emergency Call System - UpCodes
Federal Requirements for the Nurse Call/Pull Cords - Legal Beagle

best_qa_per_chain.question: surfboard safety guidelines for women
best_qa_per_chain.answer: Surfboard safety guidelines for women include choosing the right surf spot, using the appropriate surfboard, and wearing suitable surfing gear. It's also important to learn to read the waves, warm up and stretch before surfing, and consider using a soft nose guard on the surfboard to prevent injuries. Additionally, jumping feet first away from the board when falling can help avoid contact injuries.

best_qa_per_chain.question: cows with horns breeds
best_qa_per_chain.answer: Breeds of cows known for having horns include Highland cattle and Texas Longhorns. Highland cattle are recognized for their long horns and shaggy coats, while Texas Longhorns are famous for their exceptionally long horns that can span over 8 feet.

citations.title: Highland cattle - Wikipedia
Texas Longhorn - Wikipedia

best_qa_per_chain.question: Holstein cow characteristics and behavior
best_qa_per_chain.answer: Holstein cows are large dairy cattle known for their distinctive black and white markings. They typically weigh up to 725 kg (1,600 pounds) and stand about 1 meter (5 feet) tall at the shoulder. Holsteins are recognized for their mild temperament and are among the highest milk producers in the dairy industry.

citations.title: Cattle Breeds 101: Holstein Cow Characteristics
Top Uses, Characteristics and Origin of Holstein Cows
Holstein -Friesian | Cow , Characteristics , Origin, Milk...

best_qa_per_chain.question: Holstein cow horn characteristics
best_qa_per_chain.answer: Holstein cows are typically born with horns, but many farms practice dehorning for safety and management reasons. The horns have a hollow center that contains part of the sinus cavity, blood vessels, and nerves, which can grow as the cow ages. While dehorning is common, it is a controversial practice due to animal welfare concerns.

citations.title: Holstein 101
Dehorning dairy calves- The how and why of horns.

best_qa_per_chain.question: Texas church shooter Antifa connection investigation
best_qa_per_chain.answer: The investigation into the Texas church shooter, Devin Patrick Kelley, found no credible connection to Antifa. Claims linking him to the anti-fascist movement have been widely debunked as false information and conspiracy theories.

citations.title: PolitiFact: Linking shooter to Antifa is fake news
Hoaxes and False Information Proliferated After Texas Church Shooting
NOT REAL: Texas Church Shooter Was Antifa Member Who Vowed to Start Civil War

best_qa_per_chain.question: Texas church shooting Antifa claims fact check
best_qa_per_chain.answer: There is no evidence that the Texas church shooter, Devin Patrick Kelley, was connected to Antifa or any anti-fascist movement. Claims suggesting otherwise have been debunked by multiple fact-checking sources, attributing the shooting to a personal dispute rather than political motivations.
